message:
chore: add ephemeral patterns to .gitignore

Ignore .DS_Store (macOS metadata) and determinism_lab_report.jsonl
(machine-dependent test output from determinism rendering comparisons)
that should not be tracked in source control.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

+# macOS metadata
+.DS_Store
+
+# Determinism test output (ephemeral, machine-dependent)
+determinism_lab_report.jsonl
